ocr_findings.description: Sidebar colored rule-number badges (ルール1 through ルール4 with orange/pink styling) rendered as plain list items '- ルール1 ...'; formatting lost but text content preserved

reviewer_notes: Page covers パス指定の4つのルール with the four rules, the 学習のポイント sidebar explaining no-memorization needed, ルール1 details with '/画像/りんご.jpg' code example, and the パスの区切り文字 section. All text content faithfully transcribed including the code-block example and the Windowsの¥ note. Highly accurate OCR for a rule-list page.
